Author: John Wilson (jdw-ss)
Name: Bulk Desynth
Description:
Queue and run bulk desynthesis jobs without clicking each item by hand. Target by item ID, bag, item-level / equipment-slot filters, or armoury chest category. Every job is dry-run first: the plugin builds a preview list of slots it intends to desynth, you click Confirm, then it walks the list one item at a time on the framework tick.

Usage:
  /bds         - open the main window
  /bds bag <n> - preview bag N (1-4)
  /bds item <itemId> - preview every copy of an item in inventory
  /bds stop    - cancel a running queue
Punchline: Bulk-desynth items by bag, ID, or filter — dry-run preview before anything actually happens.
